overview.title: Choose the right care path before you book.
overview.description: Care+ groups the main services into one-time visits, shift coverage, and care packages so families can move into the right booking flow faster.

one-time.title: One-Time Services
one-time.description: Book an individual healthcare task without setting up a long care plan.
one-time.imageAlt: Nurse preparing supplies for a one-time visit

bookingLinks.label: IV Injection
bookingLinks.description: Quick medication support for one-time visits.

shifts.title: Shift-Based Care
shifts.description: Choose the right shift and arrange a nurse around your daily routine.
shifts.imageAlt: Nurse on shift assisting a patient

packages.title: Care Packages
packages.description: Bundle recurring needs into a clearer plan for elderly, post-op, or wound care.
packages.imageAlt: Family meeting with a care planning nurse

bookingLinks.label: Elderly Package
bookingLinks.description: Matched to elderly care nurses and family support.

bookingLinks.label: Post-op Recovery
bookingLinks.description: Ideal for recovery support after surgery.

bookingLinks.label: Wound Care Package
bookingLinks.description: Bundled support for wound dressing and healing.

booking.pickServiceIntro: Pick the service that fits your need, then move into the patient booking flow with the right filter already applied.
booking.packageStructureTitle: How the care package is organized
booking.packageStructureIntro: Packages are grouped by the kind of support families usually need most. Each one still routes into the same secure booking flow, but the starting point is easier to understand.

bundles.title: Elderly care bundle
bundles.summary: Ongoing help for daily support, reminders, and family check-ins.

bundles.title: Post-op recovery bundle
bundles.summary: Short-term care after surgery with wound support and monitoring.

bundles.title: Wound care bundle
bundles.summary: Focused dressing changes and healing support across multiple visits.

packagesList.title: Care Packages
packagesList.subtitle: Browse our care packages to find the right plan for recovery, elderly support, or long-term care.

packagesList.empty: No active care packages yet. Check back soon.
